institution.name: Ivy Tech Community College
institution.address: 50 W. Fall Creek Parkway N. Drive

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Ivy Tech Community College fell 22% between 2006 and 2009 (5.0% → 4.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ivy Tech Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.9k → $9.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ivy Tech Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ivy Tech Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
